query: I'm adding a new /usage analytics page to burncap — it needs a row of KPIs (MTD spend, today, forecast) and a 30-day spend chart. Can you build it out?
the settings page in my eastbase app looks super generic, like every other shadcn dashboard. make it feel more like our actual product
build the empty state for the alerts page when there are no alerts yet — right now it literally just says 'No data'
design a loading skeleton for the economics page while the per-customer margin data is fetching
review src/components/budgets/budget-controls.tsx and tell me how to make it feel more premium and on-brand
I'm starting a new tool under eastbase studio — a uptime/status monitor. Help me design the main dashboard so it has real personality, not a stock admin template.
the 404 page is just plain centered text right now, give it some character that matches the rest of the app
make a ranked table of top customers by spend for the admin panel — it should look polished, not like a raw spreadsheet dump
can you put together the first-run onboarding screen for burncap, for when a workspace has no usage data yet?
polish the app error boundary screen so it feels intentional and branded instead of a generic crash page
the budget forecast calc in src/lib/budgets/evaluate.ts is off by a day around month boundaries — can you fix the date bucketing?
what was our month-to-date spend trend last month vs this month? just give me the numbers
add the recharts dependency and wire up the ChartContainer provider in the project
write the marketing copy for the burncap pricing hero — like two punchy lines, no code
there's a horizontal scroll bug on mobile in the dashboard, some div is overflowing — find and fix the overflow
add a shadcn dialog component to the project
i need a new API route POST /api/v1/usage to ingest events with zod validation
generate the drizzle migration for the new notification_settings.digest column
for a quick throwaway internal script, just dump the results as a plain html table — doesn't need to be pretty at all
audit my client's WordPress marketing site for accessibility issues
